title: Tenant Isolation Verification
description: Ensure that data from one tenant is not accessible by another.
steps: Verify Tenant A customers are not visible
expected_result: Tenants only see their own data.

title: API Rate Limiting
description: Verify that API endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse.

title: Prisma Schema Integrity
description: Verify that all required fields in schema.prisma are enforced.
steps: Attempt to create a Tenant without a name
